title: Auditor Verdict — 7 URLs for Phase 32.1 Deployment
verdict_explanation: 6 of 7 URLs pass all quality, doorway, duplication, and technical gates. 1 URL (auto/large purchase scenario) needs quality improvement from 87 to 90+. Deploy the 6 approved URLs now. Fix and resubmit the auto purchase page.
doorway_risk_summary: 6 SAFE. 1 NEEDS_MORE_UNIQUE_VALUE (auto purchase). 0 DOORWAY_RISK. Hand-crafted approach successfully eliminated doorway risk.
duplication_cannibalization_summary: NO duplication. NO cannibalization. Pages target distinct intents. $20K blog and $20K scenario page have complementary intent — cross-links planned.
technical_risk: LOW — 7 new content pages, 1 new dynamic route. No database changes. Existing pages untouched (except optional blog link addition).
indexing_risk: LOW — 6 quality pages targeting distinct long-tail queries. No spam signals. Proper schema. Self-canonical. Should index cleanly given current baseline (286 indexed).
monetization_risk: NONE — pages are educational calculator content. No ad policy violations. Proper disclaimers.
probability_impact: POSITIVE — deploying 6 high-quality pages increases indexing rate visibility and provides real data on whether Google indexes quality loan scenario pages. This data feeds the scale/no-scale decision.

fixes: Strengthen demand evidence: search for '30000 auto loan 7 percent' in GSC or verify autocomplete pattern

Deepen secured vs unsecured explanation with specific examples (e.g., 'If you default on an unsecured $30K loan, the lender can sue you. If you default on a secured auto loan, they repossess the car.')
Add dealer financing negotiation tips (unique value not on other pages)
Improve FAQ specificity — add question about GAP insurance for auto loans
required_fixes_for_held_url.resubmit: After fixes, re-score. Must reach 90+ before deployment.

deploy_instructions: Deploy ONLY the 6 approved URLs. Do NOT deploy the auto purchase page. Do NOT modify Phase 31 edit hold pages. Optional: add contextual link from $20K blog to good-credit scenario page (if it fits naturally).
do_not_deploy_if: Build fails, any approved URL returns non-200, sitemap excludes approved URLs, verify-internal-links.js finds broken links, or any quality/doorway audit flag fires on deployed pages.
